name: indeed
description: Job search, job details, salary data, company profiles, reviews, and autocomplete via spec-based page extraction (5 ops) plus thin adapter (3 ops: salary slug, autocomplete fetch)

dependencies.searchJobs → getJobDetail: searchJobs returns jobkey used by getJobDetail
dependencies.getCompanyOverview → getCompanyReviews: company slug used across company operations
dependencies.getCompanyOverview → getCompanySalaries: company slug used across company operations
dependencies.autocompleteJobTitle → getSalary: autocompleteJobTitle returns normalized titles for getSalary
dependencies.autocompleteLocation → searchJobs: autocompleteLocation returns location strings for searchJobs
